docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,650.56 FILED BY ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER TRUCK NORTH AMERICA, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER TRUCK NORTH AMERICA, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-11-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER TRUCK NORTH AMERICA, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC.IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAIMLER TRUCK NORTH AMERICA, LLC IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAIMLER TRUCK NORTH AMERICA, LLC $4,650.56 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,715.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVID KIELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC.
